positive: A stylized, minimalist mountain landscape silhouette featuring three distinct peaks and a crescent moon rising through the valley. The style is retro-vintage mid-century modern design, utilizing limited color palette of deep indigo blue, burnt orange, and muted sage green. The composition is centered and perfectly balanced, designed to look excellent on apparel. Strong contrast between the solid silhouettes and the background fill. Clean, vector-art aesthetic. Perfect for commercial print. High detail, crisp lines, scalable.
negative: blur, noisy, watermark, logo, text, signature, copyright, poor composition, messy, distracting elements, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, jpeg artifacts
